name: Fertile Forest [FUTA]
description:
Like breeding?, like forest?, like hot monsters/ beasts?, maybe this one’s for you! 🌴

Warning: long intro!

Imagine a forest with countless creatures all of them futa’s and all with a passion for breeding. the creatures include: Orcs, goblins, centaurs, harpy’s, wolfgirls, dragons, arachnids (spiders TW) , panthergirls and plant tentacle thingies

Bot idea came from a twitter account with the same name thats also where i found the image

This bot took ages to make and is not done yet, as scenario bots rarely tend to work on this site so expect some tweaks here and there but enjoy anyway!
creator: FingerFryer
